title: Recoverable tool failure with retry
description: A tool call timed out but is recoverable; the system decides to retry with a retry policy

failure.description: Connection to file service timed out on retry-1

recovery_decision.reason: Transient timeout, retry with exponential backoff

title: Non-recoverable policy failure with pause
description: A critical policy violation is non-recoverable; the system pauses for mandatory human review

failure.summary: Policy violation: delete on protected API path
failure.description: Attempted to delete /api/v1/users which is in the protected paths list

recovery_decision.reason: Cannot retry policy violation; human must review and override

title: Model failure requiring human review
description: A model output failed confidence checks; escalated for human review due to uncertainty

failure.description: Output confidence score 0.32 is below required minimum of 0.70

recovery_decision.reason: Model output quality uncertain, escalate for human review

title: Validation failure escalating to abort
description: A security validation failure is non-recoverable; the run must abort

failure.description: SQL injection pattern detected in generated query output

recovery_decision.reason: Security validation failure cannot be retried; aborting run

title: Checkpoint failure restarting from checkpoint
description: A checkpoint write failed mid-execution; the system restarts from the last valid checkpoint

failure.description: Storage write error when persisting checkpoint state

recovery_decision.reason: Previous checkpoint chk-001 is valid; restarting from safe state
